ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Parent ID of the cluster */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Group ID of the cluster */,
  "num_phrases" INTEGER /* Number of phrases in the cluster */,
  "key_phrases" TEXT /* Key phrases of the cluster */,
  "num_docs" INTEGER /* Number of documents in the cluster */,
  "doc_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the documents in the cluster */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the cluster */,
  "dimension" INTEGER /* Dimension of the cluster */,
  "min_samples" INTEGER /* Minimum number of samples required for the cluster */,
  "min_cluster_size" INTEGER /* Minimum cluster size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cluster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cluster was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Clustering algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the clustering algorithm */,
  "topic_model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the topic models table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_topic_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_model_id") REFERENCES topic_models ("topic_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the document */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster ID of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the document */,
  "topic_distribution" TEXT /* Topic distribution of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_models" (
  "topic_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the topic model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Topic modeling algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the topic modeling algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the documents table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
